name: How to prove forklift operator was negligent in my Utah warehouse injury?

mainEntity.name: How to prove forklift operator was negligent in my Utah warehouse injury?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Witnesses, video, training logs, safety violations (UOSH).** Reconstruct speed/visibility.[2][4] Key factors: post-accident inspection; operator statement. Expert witness; maintenance records. Strong proof wins suits.[4]
